title: Gate-Level Average Power Estimation from RTL Activity with Graph Neural Network
authors: Ssu-Chen Chang, Yung-Chih Chen, Chun-Yao Wang, Jian-Meng Yang, Pei-Ying Liu
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Power estimation is crucial in VLSI design, enabling early evaluation of energy efficiency. Traditional gatelevel simulation-based methods offer higher accuracy but are time-consuming, while RTL simulation-based methods are faster but less precise. Recently, machine learning-based methods have emerged as a promising solution, achieving a balance between speed and accuracy. This paper presents a GNN-based framework for gate-level average power estimation, comprising two key steps: (1) signal activity prediction and (2) average power calculation. The first step improves upon an existing GNN-based switching activity predictor by integrating more circuit information and refining feature representations, leading to significant accuracy gains. The predicted signal activities are then formatted as a Switching Activity Interchange Format file, which is used by a commercial power analysis tool to compute the average total power, including dynamic and static contributions. Experimental results demonstrate that our signal activity prediction achieves an RMSE of 0.02991 on ISCAS’85 benchmarks with random patterns, a 0.05221 improvement over prior work, and 0.01852 on industrial designs with real patterns. Furthermore, our average power estimation achieves errors of $\mathbf{1. 3 3 \%}$ on ISCAS’85 benchmarks with random patterns and 5.62% on industry designs with real patterns.
title_zh: 基于图神经网络的RTL活动门级平均功耗估计
abstract_zh: 功耗估计在VLSI设计中至关重要，能够实现能量效率的早期评估。传统的基于门级仿真的方法准确度更高但耗时较长，而基于RTL仿真的方法速度更快但精度较低。近年来，基于机器学习的方法作为一种有前景的解决方案出现，在速度与精度之间取得了平衡。本文提出了一种基于GNN的门级平均功耗估计框架，包含两个关键步骤：（1）信号活动预测和（2）平均功耗计算。第一步改进了现有的基于GNN的翻转活动预测器，通过集成更多电路信息并优化特征表示，显著提升了精度。预测得到的信号活动以翻转活动交换格式文件存储，并由商用功耗分析工具用于计算平均总功耗，包括动态和静态部分。实验结果表明，我们的信号活动预测在ISCAS’85基准测试中采用随机模式时均方根误差为0.02991，较先前工作提升了0.05221；在工业设计中采用真实模式时均方根误差为0.01852。此外，我们的平均功耗估计在ISCAS’85基准测试中采用随机模式时误差为$\mathbf{1.33\%}$，在工业设计中采用真实模式时误差为5.62%。

title: FSMVision: Semantic Extraction of Finite State Machines from Diagrams via Multimodal AI
authors: Sagor Chandro Bakchy, Muhammad Aminul Islam, Sazadur Rahman, Md Tauhidur Rahman
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Finite State Machines (FSMs) are a core abstraction for modeling digital systems, control logic, and reactive behaviors. Automating FSM state and transition identification is therefore critical for computer-aided design (CAD) tools. While multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have shown promise in design automation, FSM diagrams are often not directly interpretable by these models, resulting in errors in control synthesis and HDL generation. This paper presents FSMVision, a multi-modal artificial intelligence (AI) framework that extracts complete FSM semantics directly from diagrams. By integrating visual parsing, spatial reasoning, and language grounding, FSMVision accurately identifies states, transitions, and conditions for design automation. Experiments demonstrate 99.00% state detection and 99.01% transition detection accuracy across diverse FSM diagrams of varying complexity. FSMVision surpasses existing MLLM-based baselines, achieving superior structural and semantic fidelity, and enables direct translation of FSM diagrams into executable implementations, advancing AI-driven design and control automation.
title_zh: FSMVision：基于多模态AI的图表有限状态机语义提取
abstract_zh: 有限状态机（FSM）是用于建模数字系统、控制逻辑和反应行为的核心抽象。因此，自动识别FSM的状态和转换对于计算机辅助设计（CAD）工具至关重要。尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在设计自动化领域展现出潜力，但这些模型通常无法直接解析FSM图，导致控制综合和HDL生成中出现错误。本文提出FSMVision，一种直接从图中提取完整FSM语义的多模态人工智能框架。通过集成视觉解析、空间推理和语言接地，FSMVision能够准确识别状态、转换及其条件，助力设计自动化。实验显示，在复杂度各异的FSM图中，状态检测准确率达99.00%，转换检测准确率达99.01%。FSMVision超越了现有的基于MLLM的基线方法，实现了卓越的结构与语义保真度，并能直接将FSM图转换为可执行实现，推动AI驱动的设计与控制自动化发展。

title: Machine Learning-Assisted Electro-Thermal Co-Optimization Framework for PDN in 3-D Integrated Microsystem With Embedded Microchannel Heatsink
authors: Cheng-Yi Feng, Min Tang, Da-Wei Wang, Peng Zhang, Jun Liu, Lingling Sun, Wen-Sheng Zhao
publish: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems I: Regular Papers
abstract: This paper presents a machine-learning-assisted software framework for circuit and system-level electro-thermal co-design of three-dimensional integrated circuits. The framework targets power delivery networks (PDNs) with embedded TSV microchannel structures and unifies equivalent circuit modeling, surrogate-based performance prediction, and intelligent optimization into a design automation workflow. To enable fast power integrity evaluation, a physics-based matrix equivalent circuit formulation is developed to extract the frequency dependent RLGC parameters of densely coupled TSV arrays under coolant perturbation. The proposed model achieves approximately 90% runtime reduction over full-wave electromagnetic simulation while keeping the impedance error within 6.6%. For large scale PDN synthesis, a Transformer-Pointer reinforcement learning solver trained with proximal policy optimization is introduced for decoupling capacitor placement in high-dimensional combinatorial spaces, reducing the PDN impedance by 20%. For thermal design space exploration, a tri-model hybrid semi-supervised surrogate is integrated with NSGA-II to accelerate the multi-objective thermal integrity optimization process by predicting thermal performance indices. The proposed framework provides a scalable software methodology for integrated modeling, analysis, and optimization of advanced 3D power delivery and thermal management systems.
title_zh: 带有嵌入式微通道散热器的三维集成微系统中PDN的机器学习辅助电热协同优化框架
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的软件框架，用于实现三维集成电路的电路与系统级电热协同设计。该框架针对嵌入TSV微通道结构的电源分配网络（PDN），将等效电路建模、基于代理模型的性能预测与智能优化统一集成到设计自动化流程中。为实现快速的电源完整性评估，开发了一种基于物理的矩阵等效电路公式，用于提取冷却液扰动下密集耦合TSV阵列的频率相关RLGC参数。所提模型相比全波电磁仿真可减少约90%的运行时间，同时将阻抗误差控制在6.6%以内。针对大规模PDN综合问题，引入了一种基于Transformer-Pointer的强化学习求解器（采用近端策略优化训练），用于高维组合空间中的去耦电容布局，使PDN阻抗降低20%。在热设计空间探索中，将三模型混合半监督代理模型与NSGA-II算法相结合，通过预测热性能指标加速多目标热完整性优化过程。该框架为先进三维电源传输与热管理系统的集成建模、分析与优化提供了一种可扩展的软件方法。

title: Hybrid GCN-CNN Framework for Fast Timing-Driven Layer Assignment in Global Routing
authors: Sai Harika Julakanti, Vidya A. Chhabria
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Timing-driven layer assignment during global routing significantly impacts delay and congestion. Traditional methods rely on iterative heuristics with repeated timing and congestion analysis under the hood, leading to high runtime and limited scalability for modern designs. We present a hybrid machine learning (ML) framework that combines graph convolutional networks (GCNs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for fast, timing- and congestion-driven layer assignment. GCNs model netlist connectivity and timing-critical paths, while CNNs extract spatial features such as capacity and utilization maps across the metal layer stack from a placed layout. Formulated as a multi-class classification problem, our model predicts the layer for every Steiner tree edge of a net. The ML model is trained on timing and congestion-driven global-routed layout data to predict optimized layer assignments rapidly in a single pass. Experiments on benchmark designs demonstrate that our approach improves worst-case and total negative slack post detailed route while achieving a speedup compared to traditional congestion and timing-driven methods.
title_zh: 混合GCN-CNN框架用于快速时序驱动的全局布线中层分配
abstract_zh: 时序驱动的层分配在全局布线过程中对延迟和拥塞有显著影响。传统方法依赖于迭代启发式算法，需反复进行底层时序和拥塞分析，导致运行时间长且难以适应现代设计的规模化需求。我们提出了一种混合机器学习框架，结合图卷积网络（GCN）和卷积神经网络（CNN），用于快速实现时序与拥塞驱动的层分配。GCN对网表连接性和时序关键路径建模，而CNN从布局后的金属层堆叠中提取空间特征（如容量和利用率图）。该问题被建模为多类分类任务，模型可预测每个线网中施泰纳树边的层分配。机器学习模型基于时序和拥塞驱动的全局布线布局数据进行训练，能通过单次推理快速预测优化后的层分配。在基准设计上的实验表明，我们的方法在详细布线后改善了最差负时序裕量和总负时序裕量，同时相比传统拥塞和时序驱动方法实现了加速。

title: Reliable Hardware Trojan Detection for RISC-V Processors using Formal Verification and Automation
authors: Czea Sie Chuah, Christian Appold, Tim Leinmueller
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Due to cost and time reasons, hardware development is currently often done using IP of external vendors and outsourcing of fabrication to third parties. This leads to a globalization of the supply chain, which highly increases the risk of inserted Hardware Trojans (HTs). HTs are malicious modifications of hardware to change hardware functionality or to leak secret data. Especially in safety- and security-critical areas like autonomous driving, Hardware Trojans can cause severe consequences and endanger even human lives. For this reason, we present in this work how model checking based formal verification can be used in a systematic way to detect HTs reliably. We are the first additionally using signal connection properties on top of design functionality properties for reliable HT detection and full HT detection coverage. To reduce verification time and strongly increase HT detection coverage, we developed a tool to generate a high number of properties automatically. Additionally, we intend to publish a large set of specification and microarchitecture intent derived properties important for HT detection in processors and show how these properties have to be combined with connection properties for reliable HT detection. We finished our work on identifying a complete property set for detecting each inserted Hardware Trojan modifying the Program Counter at an arbitrary position in a RISC-V processor. In this paper we present this property set and HT detection properties writing guidelines we identified during this work. Experimental results confirm we get the full proofs needed for reliable Hardware Trojan detection for all properties in below 24 hours. Our work will result in a guideline for reliable HT detection in processors using formal verification.
title_zh: 采用形式化验证与自动化的RISC-V处理器可靠硬件木马检测
abstract_zh: 由于成本和时间原因，当前的硬件开发通常使用外部供应商的IP并将制造外包给第三方。这导致了供应链的全球化，大大增加了插入硬件木马（HT）的风险。硬件木马是对硬件的恶意修改，旨在改变硬件功能或泄露机密数据。尤其是在自动驾驶等安全和关键领域，硬件木马可能造成严重后果，甚至危及人的生命。因此，在本工作中，我们展示了如何系统性地使用基于模型检查的形式化验证来可靠地检测硬件木马。我们是首个在利用设计功能属性的基础上，额外使用信号连接属性来实现可靠检测和全面覆盖硬件木马的研究团队。为了减少验证时间并大幅提高硬件木马检测覆盖率，我们开发了一个工具，可自动生成大量属性。此外，我们计划发布一组对处理器中硬件木马检测至关重要的规范和微架构意图派生属性，并展示这些属性如何与连接属性结合以实现可靠检测。我们已完成识别一组完整属性的工作，用于检测RISC-V处理器任意位置修改程序计数器的插入式硬件木马。本文展示了这组属性以及在此工作中总结的硬件木马检测属性编写指南。实验结果表明，所有属性在24小时内即可获得可靠检测硬件木马所需的完整证明。我们的工作将形成一份使用形式化验证可靠检测处理器中硬件木马的指南。

title: Unsupervised Learning Based Hardware Trojan Detection Method for RTL Designs
authors: Sying-Jyan Wang, Hou-Cheng Chen, Katherine Shu-Min Li
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Extensive research has been carried on Hardware Trojan (HT) detection. Most detection methods at the register transfer level (RTL) are based on supervised learning models. However, supervised methods require the training data to contain Trojan circuits and often involve additional efforts to address class imbalance, which limits their applicability in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a HT detection method based on an unsupervised learning model that is trained using only normal signals. Experimental results show that the proposed model achieves an average accuracy of 97.9, demonstrating the feasibility of applying unsupervised learning to RTL hardware Trojan detection and offering a new perspective for future research in this field.
title_zh: 基于无监督学习的RTL设计硬件木马检测方法
abstract_zh: 针对硬件木马（HT）检测已开展了大量研究。大多数基于寄存器传输级（RTL）的检测方法依赖于监督学习模型。然而，监督方法要求训练数据包含木马电路，且通常需要额外处理以解决类别不平衡问题，这限制了其在真实场景中的适用性。本文提出了一种基于无监督学习模型的硬件木马检测方法，该模型仅使用正常信号进行训练。实验结果表明，该模型平均准确率达到97.9%，验证了将无监督学习应用于RTL硬件木马检测的可行性，并为该领域的未来研究提供了新视角。

title: Security-Aware Printed-Circuit-Board Routing Based on Deep Reinforcement Learning
authors: Katherine Shu -Min Li, Ching-Han Lai, Fang-Chi Wu, Sying-Jyan Wang
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Modern electronic devices demand higher performance and more secure printed circuit boards (PCBs). In particular, requirements such as high-frequency operation, highspeed signal integrity, and enhanced security have become increasingly critical in modern PCB design. In this paper, we propose an integrated framework that incorporates test point insertion directly into the PCB routing process, addressing both testability and security concerns during the design stage. We prioritize nets by assigning routing sequences before trace generation. The $\mathbf{A}^{*}$ search algorithm is then employed for multilayer routing, utilizing a customized heuristic function to minimize total trace length based on the number of board layers. To determine optimal locations, we adopt a reinforcement learning (RL) approach, where an agent learns to select appropriate insertion actions guided by a carefully designed reward function. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach achieves 100% routing success and full test point coverage across all evaluated designs. The resulting design improves accessibility for electrical testing and establishes a foundation for subsequent security assessments.
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的安全感知印刷电路板布线
abstract_zh: 现代电子设备对印刷电路板（PCB）提出了更高性能和更强安全性的要求。特别是高频操作、高速信号完整性和增强安全性等需求，在现代PCB设计中变得愈发关键。本文提出一种集成框架，将测试点插入直接融入PCB布线过程，在设计阶段兼顾可测试性与安全性。我们通过分配布线顺序来优先处理网络，随后采用$\mathbf{A}^{*}$搜索算法进行多层布线，并利用定制化的启发函数基于板层数量最小化总走线长度。为确定最优位置，我们采用强化学习（RL）方法，智能体在精心设计的奖励函数引导下学习选择适当的插入动作。实验结果表明，该方法在所有评估设计中均实现了100%的布线成功率和完整的测试点覆盖。最终设计不仅提升了电气测试的可访问性，还为后续安全评估奠定了基础。

title: Detecting Hardware Trojans in Quantum Circuits Based on CodeBERT model
authors: Min-Chao Huang, Chin-Wei Tien, Sy-Yen Kuo
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: With the rapid advancement of quantum computing, the security of quantum circuits has become a critical concern, particularly against hardware Trojans that can be stealthily inserted during design or compilation. Even the insertion of a single quantum gate, such as Pauli-X, Hadamard, CNOT, or SWAP, may significantly alter circuit behavior. In this work, we propose an automated detection framework based on the pretrained Code-BERT model, originally developed for programming languages, to identify Trojan-induced anomalies in circuits represented in Quantum Assembly Language (QASM). By treating gate sequences as structured code, our approach leverages Transformer-based contextual learning without requiring manual feature engineering. Experiments on over 2,500 samples constructed from benchmark circuits demonstrate that our model achieves $96.1 \%$ accuracy and $97.0 \%$ F1 score in binary classification, with recall exceeding $97.5 \%$ for all Trojan types. In multiclass classification, the model reaches $91.1 \%$ accuracy, successfully distinguishing different Trojan gate insertions. Compared with a convolutional neural network (CNN) baseline, CodeBERT consistently achieves superior recall and robustness. These results highlight the effectiveness and scalability of CodeBERT for securing quantum circuits against hardware Trojan threats.
title_zh: 基于CodeBERT模型的量子电路中硬件木马检测
abstract_zh: 随着量子计算的快速发展，量子电路的安全性已成为关键问题，尤其是针对在设计或编译过程中可被隐秘插入的硬件木马。即使只插入单个量子门（如Pauli-X、Hadamard、CNOT或SWAP），也可能显著改变电路行为。本研究提出一种基于预训练Code-BERT模型的自动化检测框架，该模型最初针对编程语言开发，用于识别以量子汇编语言（QASM）表示的电路中的木马引发异常。通过将门序列视为结构化代码，我们的方法利用基于Transformer的上下文学习，无需手动特征工程。在基于基准电路构建的2500多个样本上的实验表明，我们的模型在二分类任务中达到了96.1%的准确率和97.0%的F1分数，所有木马类型的召回率均超过97.5%。在多分类任务中，模型达到91.1%的准确率，成功区分了不同的木马门插入操作。与卷积神经网络（CNN）基线相比，CodeBERT始终表现出更优的召回率和鲁棒性。这些结果凸显了CodeBERT在防御量子电路硬件木马威胁方面的有效性和可扩展性。

title: AutoBeaVer: Automating Behavioral Modeling and Verification in Library Characterization with LLM Agents
authors: Tianze Wu, Jian Xin, Yuan Wang, Xuliang Yu, Xunzhao Yin, Qianqian Yang, Zuochang Ye, Liang Zhao
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Standard cell libraries are foundational to digital IC design, yet their characterization-especially RTL-level behavioral modeling-remains highly time-consuming and laborintensive. Existing approaches largely rely on manual RTL Verilog creation or commercial tools with limited automation, which hinders their adaptability and scalability. To tackle these challenges, we propose AutoBeaVer, an agentic workflow driven by large language models (LLMs) for automated behavioral modeling and verification. AutoBeaVer consists of two coordinated agents: a Testbench Agent and a Verilog Modeling Agent. The Testbench Agent parses transistor-level netlist descriptions and generates SPICE-level stimuli, serving as a golden reference. The Verilog Modeling Agent iteratively synthesizes RTL code and associated testbenches, leveraging LLM-based reasoning for self-correction and simulation-based validation. This ensures functional alignment between the generated RTL and the original transistor-level design. We evaluate AutoBeaVer on a comprehensive benchmark set comprising 105 digital standard cells, achieving a pass@1 of 97.14% and demonstrating substantially improved modeling accuracy and robustness over direct LLMbased generation. Our work significantly streamlines RTL behavioral modeling in library characterization, paving the way for broader automation in digital IC design.
title_zh: AutoBeaVer: 使用LLM代理自动化库表征中的行为建模与验证
abstract_zh: 标准单元库是数字IC设计的基础，但其特性描述（尤其RTL级行为建模）仍高度耗时费力。现有方法主要依赖手动创建RTL Verilog代码或自动化程度有限的商业工具，这限制了其适应性和可扩展性。为解决这些挑战，我们提出了AutoBeaVer——一种由大语言模型（LLM）驱动的智能工作流，用于自动化行为建模与验证。AutoBeaVer包含两个协调智能体：测试平台智能体和Verilog建模智能体。测试平台智能体解析晶体管级网表描述并生成SPICE级激励，作为黄金参考标准；Verilog建模智能体则迭代合成RTL代码及关联测试平台，利用基于LLM的推理实现自我修正，并通过仿真进行验证，确保生成的RTL与原始晶体管级设计在功能上保持一致。我们在包含105个数字标准单元的全面基准集上评估了AutoBeaVer，实现了97.14%的pass@1，与直接基于LLM的生成方法相比，建模准确性和鲁棒性显著提升。我们的工作大幅简化了库特性描述中的RTL行为建模流程，为数字IC设计更广泛的自动化铺平了道路。

title: Effective Capacitance Modeling Using Graph Neural Networks
authors: Eren Dogan, Matthew R. Guthaus
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Static timing analysis is a crucial stage in the VLSI design flow that verifies the timing correctness of circuits. Timing analysis depends on the placement and routing of the design, but at the same time, placement and routing efficiency depend on the final timing performance. VLSI design flows can benefit from timing-related prediction to better perform the earlier stages of the design flow. Effective capacitance is an essential input for gate delay calculation, and finding exact values requires routing or routing estimates. In this work, we propose the first GNN-based post-layout effective capacitance modeling method, GNN- $C_{\text {eff }}$, that achieves significant speed gains due to GPU parallelization while also providing better accuracy than current heuristics. GNN-$C_{\text {eff }}$ parallelization achieves 929x speedup on real-life benchmarks over the state-of-the-art method run serially.
title_zh: 使用图神经网络的有效电容建模
abstract_zh: 静态时序分析是超大规模集成电路（VLSI）设计流程中的关键阶段，用于验证电路的时序正确性。时序分析依赖于设计的布局与布线，但同时，布局与布线的效率又取决于最终的时序性能。VLSI设计流程可通过与时序相关的预测来优化设计流程的早期阶段。有效电容是门延迟计算的核心输入参数，而其精确值的获取需要借助布线或布线估算。本研究首次提出基于图神经网络（GNN）的布局后有效电容建模方法——GNN-$C_{\text{eff}}$，该方法利用GPU并行化实现了显著的加速效果，同时在精度上优于现有启发式算法。在真实电路基准测试中，GNN-$C_{\text{eff}}$的并行化相比串行运行的最新方法实现了929倍的加速。

title: An Efficient Approach to NP3-Boolean Matching: Leveraging Multi-bit Ports and Reverse Engineering to Minimize Search Space
authors: Kai-Po Hsu, Yi-Ting Li, Fu-Cheng Cai, Chia-Feng Chien, Wuqian Tang, Ting-Yu Ku, Yu-Chen Cheng, Tsung-Han Lai, Cheng-Lung Wang, Yi-Ting Shen, Kuan-Ling Chou, Zi-Wei Huang, Tao-Chun Huang, Tzu-Li Hsu, Yung-Chih Chen, Shih-Chieh Chang, Ting-Chi Wang, TingTing Hwang, Chun-Yao Wang
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: NP3 (Non-exact Projective NPNP)-Boolean matching problem has various applications, e.g., library binding, engineering change order (ECO), and hardware Trojan detection. However, existing NP3-Boolean matching algorithms have not considered multi-bit input and output ports, which are prevalent in modern IC designs. These multi-bit ports can provide additional information for the NP3-Boolean matching process. In this paper, we propose an efficient approach to deal with NP3-Boolean matching problem, which leverages the information of multi-bit input and output ports for accelerating the matching process. We also participated in Problem A of the 2023 CAD Contest@ICCAD with this approach. The revised version of our program achieves higher scores than the $1^{{st }}$ place team of the Contest. Furthermore, our approach only requires $59 \%$ of CPU time as compared to the $1^{{st }}$ place team on average considering the benchmarks that achieve the optimal result.
title_zh: 一种高效的NP3布尔匹配方法：利用多比特端口和逆向工程最小化搜索空间
abstract_zh: NP3（非精确投影NPNP）布尔匹配问题具有多种应用，例如库绑定、工程变更指令（ECO）和硬件木马检测。然而，现有的NP3布尔匹配算法尚未考虑现代集成电路设计中普遍存在的多比特输入输出端口。这些多比特端口可以为NP3布尔匹配过程提供额外信息。本文提出了一种高效处理NP3布尔匹配问题的方法，利用多比特输入输出端口的信息来加速匹配过程。我们还采用该方法参加了2023年CAD Contest@ICCAD的A题。我们程序的修订版本最终获得了比该竞赛第一名队伍更高的分数。此外，在取得最优结果的基准测试中，我们的方法平均仅需第一名的59%的CPU时间。

title: Reverse Engineering RTL Models from DSP Slices in FPGA Netlists
authors: Avinash Hegde Kota, Aparajithan Nathamuni Venkatesan, Ranga Vemuri, John Emmert
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Reverse engineering of Look-Up table (LUT) level FPGA designs to high-level RTL helps in comprehension and verification of legacy designs. We propose a tool flow that extracts the operations performed by DSP primitives in FPGAs. DSP primitives can be used as standalone or chained structures in static or dynamic configurations. The proposed tool uses structural extraction and control signal analysis methods to reverse engineer and generate high-level RTL. DSP slices in FPGAs are commonly used to perform multiplication, multiply and accumulate, barrel shift, bit slice logic, and a few other operations. The developed technique can be used in tandem with existing tools to cover other FPGA elements such as carry elements and word-level modules. The proposed methodology is validated using real-world designs incorporating DSP primitives in complex configurations. The proposed tool extracts $100 \%$ of the operators and variables mapped to DSP slices in standalone or chained structures.
title_zh: 从FPGA网表的DSP切片中逆向工程RTL模型
abstract_zh: 将查找表级FPGA设计逆向工程为高级RTL有助于理解和验证遗留设计。我们提出了一种工具流程，用于提取FPGA中DSP原语执行的操作。DSP原语可在静态或动态配置中作为独立或链式结构使用。该工具采用结构提取和控制信号分析方法，进行逆向工程并生成高级RTL。FPGA中的DSP切片常用于执行乘法、乘加、桶形移位、位片逻辑等操作。所开发的技术可与现有工具配合使用，以覆盖其他FPGA元件，如进位元件和字级模块。通过包含复杂配置中DSP原语的实际设计，验证了所提方法。该工具可100%提取映射到独立或链式结构中DSP切片上的操作符和变量。

title: Closing the Loop: Overcoming the Tool-Feedback Gap in Agentic Hardware Design
authors: Mohammadnavid Tarighat, Kevin Immanuel Gubbi, Neusha Javidnia, Noah Marosok, Soheil Zibakhsh-Shabgahi, Marcus Halm, Mahdi Pirayesh Shirazi Nejad, Setareh Rafatirad, Farinaz Koushanfar, Houman Homayoun
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: LLM-driven hardware design remains unreliable because it is largely open-loop, producing syntactically correct RTL without the iterative grounding provided by EDA tools. We refer to this disconnect as the Tool-Feedback Gap, which is further compounded by PPA blindness, where post-synthesis power, performance, and area constraints are ignored. This paper surveys emerging closed-loop, agentic EDA systems that integrate simulation and synthesis, and highlights a growing shift toward multi-agent orchestration with specialized planner, executor, judge, and debug roles to filter noisy tool outputs and mitigate context-switching failures. It further calls for benchmarks that measure convergence efficiency and PPA-aware optimization, rather than simple pass/fail simulation, and warns that autonomous feedback loops can amplify security risks such as vulnerability injection, hardware Trojans, and vacuous verification. These risks motivate the need for standardized tool interfaces, dynamic routing to specialized smaller models, and reasoning-based repair to ensure safe and reliable agentic hardware design.
title_zh: 闭合回路：克服智能体硬件设计中的工具-反馈鸿沟
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的硬件设计仍不可靠，主要是因为其运行机制多为开环式——能生成语法正确的寄存器传输级（RTL）代码，却缺乏电子设计自动化（EDA）工具提供的迭代验证基础。我们将这种脱节现象称为“工具反馈鸿沟”，而“PPA盲点”（即忽视综合后的功耗、性能及面积约束）则进一步加剧了这一问题。本文梳理了新兴的闭环式代理型EDA系统，这类系统将仿真与综合流程相融合，并指出当前正加速转向多智能体编排模式——通过规划器、执行器、裁判器及调试器专用角色，过滤冗余的工具输出结果，降低上下文切换引发的故障率。本文进一步呼吁制定基准测试，重点衡量收敛效率及PPA感知优化能力，而非仅通过简单的通过/失败仿真来评估；同时警告自主反馈机制可能放大安全风险，例如漏洞注入、硬件木马及空洞验证。这些风险促使我们需要建立标准化工具接口、对专用小模型实施动态路由，并基于推理的修复策略，以保障代理型硬件设计的安全可靠性。

title: Accelerating Post-Quantum Cryptography via LLM-Driven Hardware-Software Co-Design
authors: Yuchao Liao, Tosiron Adegbija, Roman Lysecky
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) is crucial for securing data against emerging quantum threats. However, its algorithms are computationally complex and difficult to implement efficiently on hardware. In this paper, we explore the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) to accelerate the hardware-software co-design process for PQC, with a focus on the FALCON digital signature scheme. We present a novel framework that leverages LLMs to analyze PQC algorithms, identify performance-critical components, and generate candidate hardware descriptions for FPGA implementation. We present the first quantitative comparison between LLM-driven synthesis and conventional HLS-based approaches for low-level compute-intensive kernels in FALCON, showing that human-in-the-loop LLM-generated accelerators can achieve up to $2.6 \times$ speedup in kernel execution time with shorter critical paths, while highlighting trade-offs in resource utilization and power consumption. Our results suggest that LLMs can minimize design effort and development time by automating FPGA accelerator design iterations for PQC algorithms, offering a promising new direction for rapid and adaptive PQC accelerator design on FPGAs.
title_zh: 通过LLM驱动的软硬件协同设计加速后量子密码学
abstract_zh: 后量子密码学（PQC）对于保护数据免受新兴量子威胁至关重要。然而，其算法计算复杂度高，且难以在硬件上高效实现。本文探索了大语言模型（LLMs）在加速PQC硬件-软件协同设计过程中的潜力，重点关注FALCON数字签名方案。我们提出了一种新颖框架，利用LLMs分析PQC算法、识别性能关键组件，并为FPGA实现生成候选硬件描述。我们首次对LLM驱动综合与传统基于HLS的方法在FALCON底层计算密集型内核上进行定量对比，结果表明：在人在回路中时，LLM生成的加速器可将内核执行时间提升高达2.6倍，并缩短关键路径，同时凸显了资源利用与功耗之间的权衡。我们的结果提示，LLMs能够通过自动执行PQC算法的FPGA加速器设计迭代来最小化设计工作量与开发时间，为在FPGA上快速、自适应地设计PQC加速器提供了一条有前景的新方向。

title: Verifying Hardware Resource Isolation Using Mandatory Access Control
authors: Christopher Nokes, Kostas Amberiadis, D. Richard Kuhn, Edwards E. Reed, Michael Zuzak
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Resource isolation plays a crucial role in ensuring the security of hardware systems. Existing hardware security verification measures can identify improper isolation of hardware resources, but coverage is incomplete. As the search space increases with hardware size, the chances of an integrity flaw slipping through conventional verification methodologies also increase. In this work, we propose the application of Mandatory Access Control (MAC) models to the hardware resource isolation problem as an improvement to existing System-on-Chip (SoC) verification environments. To do so, we extend the definitions of subject and object, conventionally defined for the software domain, to a hardware context, allowing existing time-tested MAC policy models and verification methodologies to be directly applied to test the isolation of shared hardware resources. Using these definitions, we frame hardware isolation as a MAC problem and adopt the Biba interpretation of the Bell-LaPadula (BLP) model for hardware resource isolation. We use this model to propose a security verification methodology, in which subject-to-object interactions are defined as transactions, and are verified with respect to a security policy. Transactions that violate this security policy constitute a hardware isolation violation. We then use this transaction-based methodology to implement SystemVerilog-based verification environments for three open-source RISC-V cores. These environments are used to discover six instances of improper resource isolation (one novel, two previously documented, and three artificial test cases) with a simulation runtime overhead of less than $10 \%$. These violations constitute security vulnerabilities in hardware, which a malicious user could exploit to access or modify memory regions or hardware peripherals that should be isolated, thereby violating trust.
title_zh: 使用强制访问控制验证硬件资源隔离
abstract_zh: 资源隔离在确保硬件系统安全性方面起着关键作用。现有的硬件安全验证措施能够识别硬件资源的不当隔离，但覆盖范围并不完整。随着硬件规模增大而导致搜索空间扩展，传统验证方法遗漏完整性缺陷的可能性也随之增加。在本研究中，我们提出将强制访问控制（MAC）模型应用于硬件资源隔离问题，以改进现有的片上系统（SoC）验证环境。为此，我们将传统上在软件领域定义的主体和客体概念扩展到硬件上下文，使得经过时间考验的MAC策略模型和验证方法能够直接应用于测试共享硬件资源的隔离性。基于这些定义，我们将硬件隔离问题转化为MAC问题，并采用Bell-LaPadula（BLP）模型的Biba解释来处理硬件资源隔离。我们利用该模型提出了一种安全验证方法，其中主体与客体之间的交互被定义为事务，并根据安全策略进行验证。违反安全策略的事务构成了硬件隔离违规。随后，我们采用这种基于事务的方法，为三个开源RISC-V内核实现了基于SystemVerilog的验证环境。这些环境用于发现六种不当资源隔离实例（一种新的、两种先前已记录的以及三种人工测试用例），且仿真运行时开销低于10%。这些违规行为构成了硬件中的安全漏洞，恶意用户可能利用这些漏洞访问或修改本应隔离的内存区域或硬件外设，从而破坏信任。

title: ARGO+: Achieving Multi-Level Scalable GNN Training on Distributed Multi-Core Platform
authors: Yi-Chien Lin, Yuyang Chen, Sameh Gobriel, Nilesh Jain, Viktor Prasanna
publish: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as powerful tools for learning from graph-structured data and are widely used in various applications such as traffic prediction, and Electronic Design Automation, among others. However, training GNNs on large-scale graphs with hundreds of millions of nodes and billions of edges is time-consuming, often requiring days or weeks on a single machine. While distributed GNN training across multiple machines has been explored to leverage greater computation and memory resources, existing approaches primarily focus on inter-machine scalability while overlooking intra-machine scalability across multiple cores. As a result, state-of-the-art distributed GNN training frameworks lead to severe resource underutilization and limited training performance in terms of epoch time. This work introduces ARGO+, a novel GNN system designed to achieve multi-level scalability for distributed GNN training by efficiently scaling across both inter- and intra-machine levels. ARGO+ features a two-level graph partitioning strategy, exploiting parallelisms across both graph topology and feature dimensions while minimizing communication overhead and ensuring balanced workloads. In addition, ARGO+ integrates NUMA-aware optimizations to enhance intra-node scalability, addressing inefficiencies in remote-socket data accessing. During runtime, ARGO+ adopts a two-stage parallel training scheme to further reduce communication overheads and instantiates multiple training processes to exploit computation-communication overlapping. We evaluate ARGO+ on a distributed multi-core CPU cluster consisting of 8 machines, each with a dual-socket 80-core Intel Xeon processor. Our results demonstrate that ARGO+ achieves up to 1.89× speedup compared with DistDGL, and 1.53-1.56× speedup compared with state-of-the-art distributed GNN training systems. In addition, ARGO+ is compatible with the Deep Graph Library (DGL), a widely used GNN framework, enabling seamless integration with existing GNN programs. Finally, while ARGO+ adopts various optimizations to improve scalability and training performance, these optimizations do not alter the semantics of the training algorithm; thus, the model accuracy and convergence remain consistent with the original implementation of the algorithm.
title_zh: ARGO+: 在分布式多核平台上实现多级可扩展的GNN训练
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成为从图结构数据中学习的强大工具，广泛应用于交通预测、电子设计自动化等多个领域。然而，在包含数亿节点和数十亿边的大规模图上训练GNN非常耗时，单机训练往往需要数天甚至数周。尽管已有研究利用跨多台机器的分布式GNN训练来获取更大的计算和内存资源，但现有方法主要关注机器间的可扩展性，而忽视了机器内多核间的可扩展性。因此，最先进的分布式GNN训练框架会导致严重的资源利用不足，并按周期时间衡量时训练性能受限。本文提出ARGO+，一种新型GNN系统，旨在通过高效地在机器间和机器内两个层面实现扩展，从而达成分布式GNN训练的多级可扩展性。ARGO+采用了两级图分区策略，在图拓扑和特征维度上同时利用并行性，同时最小化通信开销并确保工作负载均衡。此外，ARGO+集成了NUMA感知优化，以增强节点内可扩展性，解决远程插槽数据访问的低效问题。在运行时，ARGO+采用两阶段并行训练方案以减少通信开销，并实例化多个训练进程以实现计算与通信的叠加。我们在由8台机器组成的分布式多核CPU集群上进行评估，每台机器配备双插槽80核Intel Xeon处理器。结果表明，与DistDGL相比，ARGO+实现了高达1.89倍的加速，与最先进的分布式GNN训练系统相比，实现了1.53至1.56倍的加速。此外，ARGO+与广泛使用的GNN框架Deep Graph Library（DGL）兼容，可无缝集成到现有GNN程序中。最后，尽管ARGO+采用了多种优化来提升可扩展性和训练性能，但这些优化并未改变训练算法的语义，因此模型准确性和收敛性与算法的原始实现保持一致。

title: Silicluster v2: A Scalable Open-Source Multi-Project SoC Architecture in Sky130 CMOS Enabling High-Density Modular Integration
authors: Uriel Jaramillo-Toral, Susana Ortega-Cisneros, Héctor Emmanuel Muñoz-Zapata, Iraam Antonio López-Salas
publish: IEEE Access
abstract: The increasing availability of open-source electronic design automation (EDA) tools and publicly accessible process design kits (PDKs) has expanded access to integrated circuit (IC) development; however, scalable system-level integration frameworks capable of supporting heterogeneous digital, analog, and mixed-signal systems remain limited. This paper presents Silicluster Version 2 (Silicluster v2), a hierarchical and scalable multi-project system-on-chip (SoC) architecture implemented in 130 nm complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology using a fully open-source register-transfer-level (RTL) to Graphic Data System II (GDSII) layout design flow. The proposed architecture enables the structured integration of up to 256 independent digital, analog, and mixed-signal modules within a single chip while preserving modular isolation, reusability, and routing efficiency. In contrast to its previous digital-focused implementation, Silicluster v2 incorporates infrastructure supporting transistor-level analog layout, parasitic-aware mixed-domain co-simulation using Simulation Program with Integrated Circuit Emphasis (SPICE), and integration of synthesized standard-cell netlists alongside custom transistor-level blocks. A hierarchical multiplexed interconnection scheme and centralized clock-distribution strategy mitigate fanout, congestion, and timing-closure challenges inherent to high-density modular integration. The complete system is validated through design rule checking (DRC), layout-versus-schematic (LVS) verification, parasitic extraction, and static timing analysis (STA) at 10 MHz, targeting 1.8V digital operation and 3.3V analog operation. The results demonstrate the feasibility of constructing complex heterogeneous integrated circuits using exclusively open-source methodologies, establishing Silicluster v2 as a validated reference architecture for collaborative silicon integration and scalable multi-project chip development.
title_zh: Silicluster v2：一种基于Sky130 CMOS的可扩展开源多项目SoC架构，实现高密度模块化集成
abstract_zh: 开源电子设计自动化（EDA）工具的日益普及以及可公开获取的工艺设计套件（PDK）扩大了集成电路（IC）开发的可及性；然而，能够支持异构数字、模拟及混合信号系统的可扩展系统级集成框架仍然有限。本文介绍了Silicluster版本2（Silicluster v2），这是一种采用130 nm互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）技术、通过完全开源的寄存器传输级（RTL）到图形数据系统II（GDSII）版图设计流程实现的分层可扩展多项目片上系统（SoC）架构。所提出的架构能够在单个芯片内实现多达256个独立数字、模拟及混合信号模块的结构化集成，同时保持模块隔离性、可重用性和布线效率。与之前专注于数字的实现不同，Silicluster v2集成了支持晶体管级模拟版图的基础设施、使用集成电路仿真程序（SPICE）进行寄生感知的混合域协同仿真，以及综合标准单元网表与定制晶体管级模块的集成。一种分层多路复用互连方案和集中式时钟分配策略缓解了高密度模块化集成中固有的扇出、拥塞和时序收敛挑战。完整系统通过设计规则检查（DRC）、版图与原理图一致性验证（LVS）、寄生参数提取以及10 MHz下的静态时序分析（STA）进行了验证，目标数字操作电压为1.8V，模拟操作电压为3.3V。结果证明了仅使用开源方法构建复杂异构集成电路的可行性，将Silicluster v2确立为用于协作硅集成和可扩展多项目芯片开发的经过验证的参考架构。

title: GRPO with State Mutations: Improving LLM-Based Hardware Test Plan Generation
authors: Dimple Vijay Kochar, Nathaniel Pinckney, Guan-Ting Liu, Chia-Tung Ho, Chenhui Deng, Haoxing Ren, Brucek Khailany
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: RTL design often relies heavily on ad-hoc testbench creation early in the design cycle. While large language models (LLMs) show promise for RTL code generation, their ability to reason about hardware specifications and generate targeted test plans remains largely unexplored. We present the first systematic study of LLM reasoning capabilities for RTL verification stimuli generation, establishing a two-stage framework that decomposes test plan generation from testbench execution. Our benchmark reveals that state-of-the-art models, including DeepSeek-R1 and Claude-4.0-Sonnet, achieve only 15.7$21.7 \%$ success rates on generating stimuli that pass golden RTL designs. To improve LLM-generated stimuli, we develop a comprehensive training methodology combining supervised finetuning with a novel reinforcement learning approach, GRPO with State Mutation (GRPO-SMu), which enhances exploration by varying input mutations. Our approach leverages a treebased branching mutation strategy to construct training data comprising equivalent and mutated trees, moving beyond linear mutation approaches to provide rich learning signals. Training on this curated dataset, our 7B parameter model achieves a 33.3 % golden test pass rate and a 13.9 % mutation detection rate, representing a $17.6 \%$ absolute improvement over baseline and outperforming much larger general-purpose models. These results demonstrate that specialized training methodologies can significantly enhance LLM reasoning capabilities for hardware verification tasks, establishing a foundation for automated subunit testing in semiconductor design workflows.
title_zh: GRPO与状态突变：改进基于大语言模型的硬件测试计划生成
abstract_zh: 在RTL设计过程中，早期常严重依赖临时构建的测试平台。尽管大型语言模型（LLM）在RTL代码生成方面展现出潜力，但其对硬件规格的推理能力以及生成针对性测试计划的能力仍鲜有探索。我们首次系统研究了LLM在RTL验证激励生成中的推理能力，建立了一个将测试计划生成与测试平台执行相解耦的两阶段框架。基准测试表明，包括DeepSeek-R1和Claude-4.0-Sonnet在内的最先进模型，在生成能通过黄金RTL设计的激励方面，成功率仅为15.7%–21.7%。为改进LLM生成的激励，我们开发了一套综合训练方法，结合监督微调与一种新颖的强化学习方法——带状态变异的GRPO（GRPO-SMu），该方法通过改变输入变异来增强探索。我们的方法利用基于树的分支变异策略构建包含等价树和变异树的训练数据，突破了线性变异方法，提供了丰富的学习信号。基于这一精选数据集训练后，我们的70亿参数模型实现了33.3%的黄金测试通过率和13.9%的变异检测率，相较于基线取得了17.6%的绝对提升，并超越了规模更大的通用模型。这些结果表明，专门化的训练方法能显著增强LLM在硬件验证任务中的推理能力，为半导体设计流程中的自动化子单元测试奠定了基础。

title: HeXinTimer: An AI-Enhanced STA Framework Supporting CCS and SI with Signoff Accuracy
authors: Chao Yan, Zishu Wu, Jingjia Xu, Ziwei Liu, Boyuan Liu, Xi Chen, Zefeng Wang
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: STA tools play a critical role in signoff, requiring exceptional accuracy to ensure circuit reliability. HeXinTimer is an industry-grade STA solution designed to support advanced modeling with high precision. This work introduces the following key contributions: (1) a sophisticated stage delay calculation methodology that incorporates Composite Current Source (CCS) driver and receiver models with distributed RC networks, achieving superior timing accuracy; (2) a hybrid framework that combines traditional SI flow with AI predictors, utilizing internal tool data for both training and inference, which significantly enhances accuracy and performance in delta delay estimation; (3) a robust and efficient root-finding algorithm that integrates the Traub-Ostrowski iteration and bisection method to enhance computational performance; and (4) a stage-based testing and comparison framework for comprehensive validation. HeXinTimer achieves accuracy within $3\%$ of SPICE results, while maintaining performance comparable to industry-leading tools.
title_zh: HeXinTimer：一个AI增强的STA框架，支持CCS和SI，具有签核精度
abstract_zh: STA工具在签核中扮演关键角色，需要极高的准确性来确保电路可靠性。HeXinTimer是一款面向先进建模、支持高精度的工业级STA解决方案。本文提出以下主要贡献：（1）一种复杂的级延迟计算方法，结合了复合电流源（CCS）驱动器和接收器模型与分布式RC网络，实现了卓越的时序精度；（2）一种混合框架，将传统信号完整性（SI）流程与AI预测器相结合，利用内部工具数据进行训练和推理，显著提升了增量延迟估计的准确性和性能；（3）一种鲁棒且高效的求根算法，融合Traub-Ostrowski迭代法和二分法以增强计算性能；（4）一个基于阶段的测试与对比框架，用于全面验证。HeXinTimer的精度在SPICE结果的3%以内，同时保持了与行业领先工具相当的性能。

title: Cross-Layer Co-Optimized LSTM Accelerator for Real-Time Gait Analysis
authors: Mohammad Hasan Ahmadilivani, Levent Aksoy, Mohammad Eslami, Jaan Raik, Alar Kuusik
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks have penetrated healthcare applications where real-time requirements and edge computing capabilities are essential. Gait analysis that detects abnormal steps to prevent patients from falling is a prominent problem for such applications. Given the extremely stringent design requirements in performance, power dissipation, and area, an Application-Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC) enables an efficient real-time exploitation of LSTMs for gait analysis, achieving high accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, this work presents the first cross-layer co-optimized LSTM accelerator for real-time gait analysis, targeting an ASIC design. We conduct a comprehensive design space exploration from software down to layout design. We carry out a bitwidth optimization at the software level with hardware-aware quantization to reduce the hardware complexity, explore various designs at the register-transfer level, and generate alternative layouts to find efficient realizations of the LSTM accelerator in terms of hardware complexity and accuracy. The physical synthesis results show that, using the 65 nm technology, the die size of the accelerator’s layout optimized for the highest accuracy is $0.325 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$, while the alternative design optimized for hardware complexity with a slightly lower accuracy occupies 15.4% smaller area. Moreover, the designed accelerators achieve accurate gait abnormality detection $4.05 \times$ faster than the given application requirement.
title_zh: 用于实时步态分析的跨层协同优化LSTM加速器
abstract_zh: 长短期记忆（LSTM）神经网络已渗透到对实时性和边缘计算能力至关重要的医疗保健应用中。检测异常步态以防止患者跌倒的步态分析是此类应用中的一个典型问题。鉴于性能、功耗和面积方面极为严格的设计要求，专用集成电路（ASIC）能够高效地实时利用LSTM进行步态分析，并实现高精度。据我们所知，本工作首次提出了面向实时步态分析的跨层协同优化LSTM加速器，并针对ASIC设计展开研究。我们从软件层面到版图设计进行了全面的设计空间探索。通过硬件感知量化在软件层面进行位宽优化以降低硬件复杂度，在寄存器传输级探索多种设计方案，并生成替代版图，从而在硬件复杂度和精度之间找到LSTM加速器的高效实现方案。物理综合结果表明，采用65纳米工艺，针对最高精度优化的加速器版图尺寸为0.325平方毫米，而针对硬件复杂度优化、精度略有降低的替代设计方案面积减少了15.4%。此外，所设计的加速器实现步态异常检测的准确率比给定应用要求快4.05倍。

title: TCAD-Based GGNMOS Digital Twin for ESD Characterization & Sensitivity Analysis
authors: Kunaal Pulli, Mehrdad Nourani, Charvaka Duvvury
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: In this paper, we present an ESD characterization and sensitivity analysis methodology using a Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD)-based gate-grounded NMOS (GGNMOS) digital twin. First, the virtual GGNMOS device is created by simulating the fabrication process of a $0.35 \mu \mathrm{~m}$ CMOS technology. The digital twin is then calibrated to a known device by matching the transmission line pulse (TLP) IV curves. Second, a one-at-a-time (OAT) sensitivity analysis is performed for various device/process parameters. In particular, the impact of device/process parameters on the trigger point, breakdown point, and on-resistance was quantified. Statistical box plots are used to interpret the results of the sensitivity analysis. Finally, the OAT analysis is leveraged to generate a targeted labeled dataset that includes all the failure modes with respect to the ESD design window. This proposed platform opens the door to applying machine learning (ML) to the design and refinement of the ESD protection circuit/window while accounting for process variation.
title_zh: 基于TCAD的GGNMOS数字孪生用于ESD表征与灵敏度分析
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于技术计算机辅助设计（TCAD）的栅接地NMOS（GGNMOS）数字孪生的静电放电（ESD）表征与灵敏度分析方法。首先，通过模拟$0.35 \mu \mathrm{m}$ CMOS工艺的制造过程，创建虚拟GGNMOS器件。随后，通过匹配传输线脉冲（TLP）IV曲线，将数字孪生校准至已知器件。其次，针对多种器件/工艺参数进行单因素（OAT）灵敏度分析，量化了这些参数对触发点、击穿点和导通电阻的影响，并利用统计箱线图解释分析结果。最后，基于OAT分析生成了针对ESD设计窗口的目标标注数据集，涵盖所有失效模式。该平台为应用机器学习（ML）优化ESD保护电路/设计窗口并考虑工艺变异性开辟了途径。

title: Multi-Node Timing and Power Estimation with Adapter-Based Transfer Learning
authors: Luis Peña Treviñoa, Eric Guerra Ribeirof, Lirida Navinera, Fady Abouzeidf, Philippe Rochef
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: In recent years, Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have shown promise in predicting post-route timing and power metrics early in the physical design process. However, a major challenge lies in their limited adaptability to different technology nodes. The training datasets for these models are highly dependent on specific technology nodes, corner parameters, and process variations, limiting their generalizability across various use cases. This constraint reduces their effectiveness in real-world applications, where performance analysis is required across different technology nodes, as in heterogeneous 3D integrated circuits. To address these challenges, we propose a framework based on Graph Neural Networks enhanced with ParameterEfficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) techniques. This approach enables rapid and accurate estimation of power and timing metrics across different technology nodes or corners without requiring full retraining of a large pre-trained model. Experimental results on open-source benchmark designs spanning three technology nodes demonstrate that our framework achieves up to two orders of magnitude runtime improvement, reduces error compared to commercial tools, and streamlines model training adaptability without compromising prediction accuracy.
title_zh: 基于适配器迁移学习的多节点时序与功耗估计
abstract_zh: 近年来，图神经网络（GNNs）在物理设计早期阶段预测布线后时序与功耗指标方面展现出潜力。然而，其主要挑战在于对不同技术节点的适应性有限。这类模型的训练数据集高度依赖于特定技术节点、工艺角参数及工艺波动，导致其在多种应用场景下的泛化能力受限。这一约束降低了模型在实际应用中的有效性——例如在异构三维集成电路中，跨不同技术节点的性能分析至关重要。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于参数高效微调（PEFT）技术增强的图神经网络框架。该方法无需对大型预训练模型进行完整重训练，即可在不同技术节点或工艺角下快速准确地估算功耗与时序指标。在涵盖三个技术节点的开源基准设计上的实验结果表明，与商业工具相比，我们的框架实现了高达两个数量级的运行时间提升，降低了误差，并在不牺牲预测精度的前提下简化了模型训练的自适应性。

title: BERT-HIT: A Transformer-Based Approach for Hardware Trojan Detection in Gate-Level Netlists
authors: Lizi Zhang, Navid Nader Tehrani, Azadeh Davoodi, Rasit Onur Topaloglu
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Recent years have seen significant improvement in gate-level Hardware Trojan (HT) detection using machine learning (ML) techniques. The majority of ML approaches for gate-level Hardware Trojan detection have relied exclusively on extracting numerical features from circuit netlists, such as fan-in/fan-out counts, path delays, and structural metrics, to train classification models. This work introduces BERT-HIT which leverages BERT (Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers) for HT detection. Our method learns to understand the structural patterns and connectivity relationships in gate-level netlists, capturing complex contextual dependencies between circuit elements that hand-crafted features cannot represent. This direct text-processing approach eliminates the feature engineering bottleneck while achieving superior detection performance. Furthermore, we incorporate attention visualization techniques to provide explainability, revealing which parts of the netlist text contribute most to HT detection decisions. Our experiments on Trust-HUB benchmarks demonstrate that BERTHIT achieves superior detection capabilities with an average 94.9 % True Positive Rate, 96.6 % True Negative Rate, and 0.829 Matthews Correlation Coefficient, significantly outperforming existing feature-oriented detection methods.
title_zh: BERT-HIT：基于Transformer的门级网表硬件木马检测方法
abstract_zh: 近年来，利用机器学习技术在门级硬件木马检测方面取得了显著进展。大多数基于机器学习的门级硬件木马检测方法仅依赖从电路网表中提取数值特征（如扇入/扇出数、路径延迟和结构指标）来训练分类模型。本文提出BERT-HIT方法，利用BERT（来自Transformer的双向编码器表示）进行硬件木马检测。我们的方法学习理解门级网表中的结构模式和连接关系，捕捉电路元素之间复杂的上下文依赖关系，而这些是手工设计特征无法表示的。这种直接的文本处理方法消除了特征工程瓶颈，同时实现了更优的检测性能。此外，我们引入注意力可视化技术以提供可解释性，揭示网表文本中哪些部分对硬件木马检测决策贡献最大。在Trust-HUB基准测试上的实验表明，BERT-HIT实现了优越的检测能力，平均真阳性率为94.9%，真阴性率为96.6%，马修斯相关系数为0.829，显著优于现有的面向特征的检测方法。

title: Fine-Grained Patching via Contention Balancer: A Practical Mitigation Strategy for Spectre Vulnerabilities Using SpecScope Contention Maps
authors: Najmeh Nazari, Banafsheh Saber Latibari, Behnam Omidi, Hosein Mohammadi Makrani, Fatemeh Movafagh, Seyede Elahe Hosseini Imeni, Chongzhou Fang, Abhijit Mahalanobis, Khaled N. Khasawneh, Houman Homayoun, Hossein Sayadi
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Spectre attacks exploit speculative execution to leak sensitive data, especially in Artificial Intelligence (AI) workloads, through microarchitectural side channels, posing persistent challenges to modern processors. While advanced defenses like adaptive contention monitoring and resource isolation offer strong protection, they often require costly hardware redesigns. To provide a practical alternative, we introduce Contention Balancer, a fine-grained, software-level mitigation that leverages SpecScope’s automated gadget identification and contention mapping. By injecting carefully selected balancing instructions into speculative paths, Contention Balancer equalizes execution characteristics between transient and non-transient paths, effectively masking contentionbased side-channel signals without altering program behavior. This approach delivers immediate, low-overhead protection against Spectre vulnerabilities, offering a deployable and cost-effective solution for securing computing systems in the AI era.
title_zh: 通过争用平衡器实现细粒度补丁：使用SpecScope争用图应对Spectre漏洞的实用缓解策略
abstract_zh: Spectre攻击利用推测执行，通过微架构侧信道泄露敏感数据，尤其在人工智能（AI）工作负载中表现突出，对现代处理器构成了持续的挑战。尽管诸如自适应竞争监控和资源隔离等高级防御措施能提供强有力保护，但它们往往需要代价高昂的硬件重新设计。为了提供一种实用的替代方案，我们提出了Contention Balancer——一种细粒度的软件级缓解措施，它利用了SpecScope的自动化漏洞工具识别和竞争映射功能。通过向推测路径中精心插入平衡指令，Contention Balancer均衡了瞬态路径与非瞬态路径的执行特征，在不改变程序行为的前提下有效掩盖基于竞争的侧信道信号。该方法能够即时提供低开销的保护，抵御Spectre漏洞，为AI时代计算系统的安全性提供了一种可部署且经济高效的解决方案。

title: Parasitics-Aware Framework for Integrated OTA Sizing and Layout Synthesis in FinFET Technologies
authors: Endalk Y. Gebru, Subhadip Ghosh, Ramesh Harjani, Sachin S. Sapatnekar
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Traditional operational transconductance amplifier (OTA) optimizers decouple sizing from layout synthesis, leading to poor results under layout-induced parasitics—a problem exacerbated in FinFET nodes. This work proposes a hierarchical methodology for FinFET nodes that maintains self-consistency between schematic-level and postlayout design, leveraging a SPICE-calibrated $g_{m} / I_{D}$ methodology that incorporates layout parasitics. Unlike machine-learning-based approaches that rely on heavy SPICE simulations and large datasets, our approach is computationally efficient and invokes SPICE sparingly. Experimental results across four OTA topologies demonstrate that performance of the sized circuit is greatly degraded after layout (up to 44% in UGF, 17 dB in DC gain, and 22 dB in CMRR), yet the systematic, closed-loop use of correction factors with selfconsistent $g_{m} / I_{D}$ methodology enables recovery of postlayout performance and yields designs that meet specifications. The entire flow requires only $\mathbf{1 0 - 1 5}$ full SPICE simulations, enabling thorough exploration of design space for high-quality solutions.
title_zh: 面向FinFET技术的寄生感知集成OTA尺寸优化与版图综合框架
abstract_zh: 传统运算跨导放大器（OTA）优化器将尺寸调整与版图综合解耦，导致在版图引入寄生参数时效果不佳——该问题在FinFET节点中尤为突出。本文提出一种面向FinFET节点的层次化方法，通过采用经SPICE校准且纳入版图寄生参数的$g_{m}/I_{D}$方法论，保持原理图级与后版图设计之间的自洽性。与依赖大量SPICE仿真和大数据集的机器学习方法不同，本文方法计算高效且仅需少量SPICE调用。跨四种OTA拓扑的实验结果表明，经尺寸调整的电路在版图后性能大幅退化（单位增益频率最多降低44%，直流增益最多降低17 dB，共模抑制比最多降低22 dB），但基于自洽$g_{m}/I_{D}$方法论的系统性闭环校正因子应用可恢复后版图性能，并生成满足设计规格的方案。整个流程仅需**10-15次**完整SPICE仿真，即可充分探索设计空间以获得高质量解决方案。

title: Reusing Assertion Properties as Hardware Checkers: Implementation and their Software and Hardware Recovery
authors: Czea Sie Chuah, Christian Appold, Tim Leinmueller
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Assertion Checkers are widely used in pre-silicon verification to catch bugs early, e.g. in simulation and formal verification environment, saving time and costs. These assertion checkers in the form of properties can be also reused as hardware checkers to validate the correct behaviour of real hardware infield. They enable detection of errors during runtime for errors that escaped the used verification approaches, e.g. for difficult to trigger corner cases in the hardware appearing under real world conditions. Additionally, errors introduced in manufacturing or due to hardware faults, e.g. caused through radiation or aging, can be detected with them. An advantage of using hardware checkers in post-silicon is they can be reused from pre-silicon assertion checkers, saving time and effort of creating them from scratch. Our work showcases the implementation of such checkers starting from their selection from pre-silicon properties and their optimization for use as checkers in hardware. Afterwards, we convert them into synthesizable hardware description language code and finally suggest a new interface to integrate the checkers into a processor design. We demonstrate our work on a 32-bit RISC-V processor NS31A on a FPGA development board, the Arty-7 100T CSG324 Xilinx and show checker inclusion in hardware needs only very little additional area. On top of that, we also shows suitable software and hardware recovery methods when a checker is raised. This enables reliable hardware operation even in case of errors and prevents undesired behavior happening.
title_zh: 重用断言属性作为硬件检查器：实现及其软件和硬件恢复
abstract_zh: 断言检查器广泛应用于芯片前验证中，用于在仿真和形式化验证等环境中早期发现错误，从而节省时间和成本。这些以属性形式存在的断言检查器还可重复用作硬件检查器，验证真实硬件在实地环境中的正确行为。它们能够检测那些逃过现有验证方法（例如在实际条件下难以触发的硬件边界情况）的运行时错误。此外，由制造缺陷或硬件故障（如辐射或老化导致的故障）引入的错误也能被它们检测到。在芯片后验证阶段使用硬件检查器的一个优势在于，它们可以复用芯片前验证阶段的断言检查器，从而避免从零开始设计的时间和精力。我们的工作展示了如何从芯片前验证阶段的属性中选择这类检查器，优化其作为硬件检查器的用途，随后将其转换为可综合的硬件描述语言代码，并最终提出一种新接口，将检查器集成到处理器设计中。我们在搭载于Arty-7 100T CSG324 Xilinx FPGA开发板上的32位RISC-V处理器NS31A上演示了我们的工作，并表明在硬件中加入检查器仅需极少额外面积。此外，我们还展示了在检查器被触发时的适当软件和硬件恢复方法。这确保了即使在出现错误时硬件也能可靠运行，并防止出现非预期行为。

title: HDL-DFGen: A Digital Filter Hardware Description Generation Framework
authors: Pedro T. L. Pereira, Eduardo Da Costa, Sergio Bampi
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: This paper presents HDL-DFGen, a framework for automatically generating digital filter architectures in VHDL and Verilog. The tool supports fixed FIR filters, adaptive filters from the LMS family, and novel reconfigurable architectures capable of implementing multiple algorithms within a single circuit. By combining parameterizable templates and reusable libraries, HDL-DFGen allows designers to specify key requirements, such as filter length, precision of integer and fractional parts, filter type, and architectural configuration (parallel, semi-parallel, or sequential), and obtain complete hardware descriptions in seconds. The proposed framework significantly reduces the time and effort required to design complex VLSI architectures, thus favoring the development of dedicated circuits for signal processing applications. HDL-DFGen enables the creation of high-order filters with scalable performance while preserving area and power efficiency. Results demonstrate that the automatically generated architectures achieve competitive metrics regarding circuit complexity, power consumption, and processing throughput.
title_zh: HDL-DFGen: 数字滤波器硬件描述生成框架
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了HDL-DFGen，一个用于在VHDL和Verilog中自动生成数字滤波器架构的框架。该工具支持固定FIR滤波器、LMS系列自适应滤波器，以及能够在单一电路中实现多种算法的新型可重构架构。通过结合可参数化模板和可复用库，HDL-DFGen允许设计者指定关键需求，例如滤波器长度、整数和小数部分的精度、滤波器类型以及架构配置（并行、半并行或顺序），并在数秒内获得完整的硬件描述。该框架显著减少了设计复杂VLSI架构所需的时间和精力，从而有利于开发用于信号处理应用的专用电路。HDL-DFGen能够创建具有可扩展性能的高阶滤波器，同时保持面积和功耗效率。结果表明，自动生成的架构在电路复杂度、功耗和处理吞吐量方面达到了具有竞争力的指标。

title: A Transistor Operating State Constraints-Based Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithm for Optimizing Analog Circuit Sizing_supp1-3697697.pdf
authors: Dunwei Gong
publish: N/A
abstract: Analog circuit optimization problem is a multi-objective optimization problem involving multiple conflicting performance metrics. Existing methods face challenges of low efficiency due to frequent SPICE simulation calls and generating infeasible solutions caused by physical constraint violations. To address these issues, this paper proposes a conditional cascade network-based analog circuit optimization algorithm (CCN-ACOA). The core innovations of this algorithm include: (1) proposing a Conditional Cascade Network (CCN) as a surrogate model that adopts a ”classify-first, predict-later” strategy, incorporating transistor operating states as hard constraints to ensure design feasibility; (2) designing an information entropy-based model updating strategy that efficiently trains the CCN by performing fine-tuning through incremental data selection and parameter freezing mechanisms; (3) a population correction-based multi-objective optimization method is proposed, which combines a Pareto-based filling criterion with prediction uncertainty and population crowding information to guide the evolutionary direction of the population. Experimental validation on the AI-Circuit dataset and four typical analog circuits demonstrate that the proposed CCN-ACOA outperforms five state-of-the-art analog circuit optimization algorithms in terms of both simulation performance metrics and hypervolume indicators. These results validate that CCN-ACOA provides an effective solution for the automation of analog integrated circuit design.
title_zh: 基于晶体管工作状态约束的多目标进化算法用于优化模拟电路尺寸设计_补充材料1-3697697.pdf
abstract_zh: 模拟电路优化问题是一个涉及多个相互冲突性能指标的多目标优化问题。现有方法由于频繁调用SPICE仿真而面临效率低下的挑战，同时因物理约束违反而产生不可行解。针对这些问题，本文提出了一种基于条件级联网络的模拟电路优化算法（CCN-ACOA）。该算法的核心创新包括：（1）提出条件级联网络（CCN）作为代理模型，采用“先分类后预测”策略，将晶体管工作状态作为硬约束，确保设计可行性；（2）设计基于信息熵的模型更新策略，通过增量数据选择和参数冻结机制对CCN进行微调，实现高效训练；（3）提出基于种群修正的多目标优化方法，结合基于Pareto的填充准则、预测不确定性和种群拥挤度信息，引导种群的进化方向。在AI-Circuit数据集和四种典型模拟电路上的实验验证表明，所提出的CCN-ACOA在仿真性能指标和超体积指标上均优于五种最先进的模拟电路优化算法。这些结果验证了CCN-ACOA为模拟集成电路设计的自动化提供了有效解决方案。

title: Cost-Effective Co-Optimization of SoC Partitioning and Global Chiplet Placement for 2.5D Integration
authors: Chou-Yen-Chih Li, Chih-Yu Li, Yung-Chih Chen, Liang-Chia Cheng
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: As System-on-Chip (SoC) designs grow in complexity and size, fabricating monolithic dies becomes increasingly costly, making chiplet-based integration a promising alternative. However, existing partitioning methods often produce sub-optimal results due to inaccurate estimation of design quality, especially when physical information such as chiplet shape is unavailable. To address this challenge, we propose a chiplet partitioning and placement co-optimization flow that integrates placement into the partitioning stage, enabling more accurate evaluation of power, latency, and recurring engineering cost. By performing concurrent placement and chiplet shape adjustment during partitioning, our method overcomes the lack of early physical information and achieves more accurate quality estimation and superior overall design quality, improving final design quality by up to $37.87 \%$ with an average improvement of $\mathbf{1 3. 5 6 \%}$ compared to conventional two-stage flows.
title_zh: 面向2.5D集成的SoC划分与全局芯粒布局的成本效益协同优化
abstract_zh: 随着系统级芯片（SoC）设计的复杂性和规模不断增长，制造单片芯片的成本越来越高，因此基于小芯片的集成成为一种有前景的替代方案。然而，现有的分区方法由于设计质量估计不准确（尤其是在无法获得小芯片形状等物理信息时），往往产生次优结果。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种小芯片分区与布局协同优化流程，将布局整合到分区阶段，从而实现对功耗、延迟和重复工程成本的更准确评估。通过在分区过程中同时进行布局和小芯片形状调整，我们的方法克服了早期物理信息缺乏的问题，实现了更准确的质量估计和更优的整体设计质量，与传统两阶段流程相比，最终设计质量提升高达37.87%，平均提升13.56%。

title: Semantic-Guided Test Generation using Fine-Tuned LLMs for Validation of Hardware Accelerators
authors: Emma Andrews, Aruna Jayasena, Prabhat Mishra
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: The increasing complexity and heterogeneity of programmable hardware accelerators, such as Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) and Tensor Processing Units (TPU), pose a significant challenge for automated test generation and functional validation. Traditional validation techniques often struggle to scale with architectural diversity and cannot effectively exploit the semantic relationships between instructions and data. Validation using large language models (LLMs) is a promising avenue for generating assembly programs (test vectors) for processor verification since LLMs are trained with diverse general-purpose processor designs. Unfortunately, LLMs are unsuitable for validation of programmable hardware accelerators since there is a lack of training data for such implementations. In this paper, we propose an automated framework that fine-tunes LLMs to generate semantically correct test cases directed toward improved design coverage while monitoring the functional correctness of the outputs. The generated test cases are evaluated by a compiler for correctness before using them for validation of hardware accelerators. We facilitate a mechanism for the LLM to observe the design coverage on the implementation based on the previously generated test patterns. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our framework can achieve 33% improvement in design coverage compared to state-of-the-art test generation with the added advantage of monitoring the functional correctness of the design. Our framework has identified several functional bugs in the open-source tiny-gpu implementation.
title_zh: 语义引导的微调大语言模型在硬件加速器验证中的测试生成
abstract_zh: 可编程硬件加速器（如图形处理单元（GPU）和张量处理单元（TPU））日益增长的复杂性和异构性，给自动化测试生成和功能验证带来了重大挑战。传统的验证技术往往难以适应架构的多样性，也无法有效利用指令与数据之间的语义关系。使用大型语言模型（LLM）进行验证是一条有前景的途径，可以生成用于处理器验证的汇编程序（测试向量），因为LLM是基于多种通用处理器设计训练而成的。遗憾的是，由于缺乏针对此类实现的训练数据，LLM并不适用于可编程硬件加速器的验证。本文中，我们提出了一个自动框架，该框架对LLM进行微调，以生成语义正确的测试用例，旨在提高设计覆盖率，同时监控输出的功能正确性。生成的测试用例在用于硬件加速器验证之前，会由编译器评估其正确性。我们提供了一种机制，使LLM能够基于先前生成的测试模式观察实现上的设计覆盖率。广泛的实验评估表明，与最先进的测试生成方法相比，我们的框架在设计覆盖率上实现了33%的提升，并且额外具有监控设计功能正确性的优势。我们的框架已在开源的tiny-gpu实现中发现了多个功能错误。
